title: Segfault when inserting into table with generated columns
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c0 INTEGER, c1 TEXT, c2 INTEGER GENERATED ALWAYS AS (c0 + 1), c3 INTEGER GENERATED ALWAYS AS (CASE WHEN c1 IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE LENGTH(c1) END), c4 TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2(c0 INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, c1 DOUBLE PRECISION, c2 TEXT DEFAULT 'default', c3 DOUBLE PRECISION GENERATED ALWAYS AS (c1 * 2), c4 DOUBLE PRECISION CHECK(c4 > 0));
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE c3 > 0 OR c1 IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Segfault on insert into table with generated columns
